content.rendered:
Sorry for the late update! I’m STILL really loopy and so very much tired. I went into surgery on Wed Aug 23 in the afternoon and I’m still alive. Barely. My uh. Surgery didn’t go well and once I actually woke up, it sounds my intestines were full of pus and I was infected EVERYWHERE inside the bowels along with the bowels too. Like almost didn’t wake up on the table is what the one surgery doctor said. But I did thankfully and did wake up. I have so much pain and three drains in my me now but I can start the healing process now which is the first “step” into “walking” back home.

Not sure when the next Duluth/surgery update will be, but I’ll post it here first. Thanks everyone for caring…I do appreciate the thoughts and caring.

Tucker
